name: Cannoli Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Process ricotta, powdered sugar, and vanilla in a food processor until smooth.
2. Add citron, orange peel, and broken-up chocolate to the food processor. Pulse with short bursts just until chopped.
3. Use the filling to fill cannoli shells, garnishing the ends with finely chopped almonds or other nuts.
Variations:
- Fluffy Riccota Filling: After combining ricotta, powdered sugar, and vanilla, fold in 1 cup of heavy cream beaten until stiff.
- Pistachio Filling: Add a few drops of green food coloring to tint the filling pale green. Garnish the ends of filled shells with chopped pistachio nuts.
